description: Address v2 review findings: fix mixed-language logs to Spanish, clear coinDistributionPending in cleanupSeason, cap bribe at proposal time
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts proposeAlliance, change English bribe log messages to Spanish
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts acceptAlliance, change English bribe log message to Spanish
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts proposeAlliance, cap bribeAmount to from.coins at proposal time
In src/utils/gameLogic.ts cleanupSeason, add coinDistributionPending: null to the returned state
acceptance_criteria: All alliance bribe log messages use Spanish consistently
coinDistributionPending is cleared to null in cleanupSeason
Bribe amount is capped to proposer's coins at proposal time
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc --noEmit` and confirm zero errors
findings: All 3 v2 review issues fixed: (1) Alliance bribe logs changed from English to Spanish ('propone alianza a', 'recibe X monedas de soborno de') matching the existing battle distribution Spanish logs. (2) coinDistributionPending: null added to cleanupSeason state object. (3) bribeAmount capped to from.coins at proposal time using Math.min, stored as effectiveBribe. TypeScript compiles cleanly.
